mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM activity WHERE plot_id = #{plotId} AND occur_date >= CURDATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAY) AS activity_count, IFNULL((SELECT SUM(qty_kg) FROM harvest_record WHERE plot_id = #{plotId} AND harvest_date >= CURDATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAY), 0) AS total_harvest_kg, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM batch WHERE plot_id = #{plotId} AND harvest_date >= CURDATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAY AND deleted_at IS NULL) AS batch_count
